problem id: 24ef5b88
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(7)

examples:
  01111011 -> 10111101
  00001001 -> 10000100
  10011011 -> 11001101
  10111101 -> 11011111
  10100010 -> 01010001
  01101110 -> 00110111
  10011101 -> 11001111
  10001101 -> 11000111
  10111110 -> 01011111
  00010100 -> 00001010

query: 01001110
predicted answer: 00100111
